item.title: SNDK Tops S&P 500 Amid Optimism Around DRAM ETF’s $1B AUM
item.description: SanDisk stock surges on optimism around Nasdaq-100 and DRAM ETF.

item.title: UAL Goes Silent On Airline Merger Speculation Following AAL Snub
item.description: A Bloomberg report earlier this month said that Kirby has floated a possible combination with American with senior government officials.

item.title: Tradr Set to Launch Inverse ETFs on Lumentum and Sandisk
EXCLUSIVE: POET Stock Rallies To Near 11-Year High – Wolfpack Says Market Will ‘Render Its Verdict‘ By 2027
item.description: Wolfpack Research told Stockwits that releasing its findings before the April 15 tax deadline was intended to help shareholders avoid the need to file...

item.title: Why Is TORO Stock Surging Today?
item.description: The company declared a special dividend, which is taxable and payable in cash or stock.
